title: TaskContract
description: A machine-readable contract defining what a worker must deliver. Replaces ambiguous issue descriptions with verifiable agreements.

goal.description: What this task must achieve, stated as a verifiable outcome

prohibited_paths.description: File/directory paths the worker MUST NOT modify

dependencies.description: Task IDs that must be completed before this task can start

acceptance_criteria.description: Specific, verifiable criteria inherited from seed + story

scope_out.description: Features or behaviors this task explicitly will NOT implement. Complements prohibited_paths (file-level) with feature-level exclusions.

eval_commands.description: Shell commands to mechanically verify the task (from .geas/memory/_project/conventions.md)

escalation_policy.description: What happens when retry budget is exhausted

evaluator.description: Agent responsible for scoring this dimension

threshold.description: Minimum score required to pass. Below threshold blocks Tier 3 entry.

rubric.description: Quality rubric dimensions with scoring thresholds. All must pass for Tier 3 entry.
